_comment: Phase 6 / Gate 6 evidence manifest — CLOSED LOOP end-to-end + LIVE Vercel demo. This is the deliberate hackathon STOP point. Bank-grade Phases 7-15 are intentionally NOT built. The closed-loop test wires the five real packages against the safe simulator; the live demo is browser-verified.
phase: Closed loop + live Vercel demo (hackathon checkpoint)
deliberate_stop: Gate 6 — bank-grade Phases 7-15 (fleet-scale, prod agent backends, on-prem LLM serving, SIEM/AD/EDR adapters, DR/compliance) are a later relaunch and intentionally absent.

criteria.title: Full closed loop runs end-to-end against the safe simulator
criteria.expected: simulator -> detection MASS_ENCRYPTION -> dial-gated containment (audit precedes action) -> agent isolates -> LLM C7 advisory; fail-safe path issues no command

criteria.title: Live demo-mode dashboard on Vercel with a genuinely live DeepSeek report
criteria.expected: crown-defense.vercel.app loads publicly; scenario runs; /api/analyze returns live DeepSeek (faithfulness-gated); key server-side only

gate_checks.check: vitest run (full suite incl. closed-loop + live DeepSeek)
fresh-context adversarial review that the closed-loop test is a genuine proof (not hollow/mocked)
gate_checks.expected: PASS — real package entrypoints; invariants asserted non-trivially

gate_checks.check: browser automation verifies the deployed URL end-to-end
gate_checks.expected: Overview/Incident render; Generate -> live DeepSeek report renders
